children.text: To create a shortcut to this profile or access the profile context menu (for rename, delete, etc.), touch the edit icon on the right. To switch to a different profile, tap the profile name briefly.
Welcome to OpenVPN Connect. OpenVPN requires a .ovpn profile to connect to a server. Please go to Menu / Import to import a profile or Menu / Help for more information.
Your Secure and Private Path to the Internet
